title: heterotheca villosissima
intro: Heterotheca villosissima, also known as hairy false goldeneye, is a plant species in the aster family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Heterotheca villosissima include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
